subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Hearken unto My call, for it draweth thee unto the Kingdom of My nearness and the Dominion of My presence, and remindeth thee of My verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد اسمع ندائی انه یجذبک الی ملکوت قربی و جبروت لقائی و یذکرک بآیاتی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power of prayer, @prayer for nearness to God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution
